final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original e-commerce announcement poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration campaign.

Style/medium: clean commercial poster design with the confident restraint of modern Chinese tech branding, designed for e-commerce detail pages and social feed impact
Composition: centered product hero with generous breathing room, promotional headline anchoring the upper third, campaign badge and CTA in the lower zone, balanced asymmetry
Subject: UGREEN NAS private cloud device as the hero product, accompanied by subtle anniversary celebration visual cues
Scene/backdrop: minimal studio environment with soft gradient suggesting cloud storage and data flow, clean negative space for platform-native cropping
Lighting/mood: crisp product lighting with a warm celebratory glow, the quiet confidence of a trusted tech companion
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as anchor, balanced with neutral whites and subtle gold accents for the anniversary milestone
Materials/textures: matte tech surface with soft product reflections, premium uncoated paper feel for the poster substrate
Text (verbatim): 绿联私有云 618周年庆
Constraints: product clearly identifiable as UGREEN NAS, anniversary messaging prominent, e-commerce safe zones respected for platform overlays
Avoid: cluttered information hierarchy, generic stock-photo tech aesthetic, excessive decorative elements that compete with product
